instructions: Heat sesame oil in clay pot, fry ginger slices until fragrant and edges curl.
Add chicken pieces, stir-fry until surface is sealed.
Pour in rice wine and water, bring to boil.
Simmer on low heat 30 minutes until chicken is tender.
Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces, marinate with rice wine and sesame oil 15 minutes.
Place in heatproof dish, top with red dates and ginger.
Steam over high heat 20 minutes.
Drizzle sesame oil before serving.
Blanch chicken in boiling water 3 minutes, rinse.
Place chicken, ginger, dang gui, red dates in clay pot with water.
Bring to boil, reduce to low simmer 1.5 hours.
Add goji berries in last 10 minutes. Season with salt.
Heat sesame oil, fry ginger until golden and fragrant.
Add chicken, sear on all sides.
Pour in rice wine and brown sugar.
Cover and simmer 25 minutes until tender.
Blanch chicken pieces, drain and rinse.
Combine all herbs, chicken and water in pot.
Bring to boil, simmer on low 1 hour.
Season lightly with salt. Drink soup and eat chicken.
Slice chicken, marinate with soy sauce, cornstarch and sesame oil.
Soak and slice mushrooms.
Layer mushrooms and chicken in dish with ginger on top.
Steam 18 minutes until cooked through.
Marinate chicken with soy sauce, rice wine, sesame oil.
Spread pumpkin cubes on plate, place chicken on top.
Add ginger slices.
Steam 20 minutes until pumpkin is soft and chicken cooked.
Marinate wings with soy sauce, rice wine, ginger 20 minutes.
Pan-fry wings until golden on both sides.
Add honey and a splash of water, cover and braise 15 minutes.
Reduce sauce until glossy coating forms.
Cut chicken and vegetables into chunks.
Sauté onion in oil, add chicken and brown.
Add carrot, potato and water, bring to boil.
Simmer 20 minutes, add curry roux and stir until thickened.
Blanch chicken, rinse.
Soak peanuts 30 minutes.
Combine all ingredients in pot, bring to boil.
Simmer on low 1.5 hours. Season with salt.
Bring broth to boil with ginger.
Add chicken shreds, cook 5 minutes.
Add tomatoes, simmer 10 minutes until soft.
Slowly drizzle in beaten egg, stir gently. Garnish with scallion.
Brown chicken pieces in oil with ginger.
Add soy sauce, sugar, star anise and water.
Add chestnuts, bring to boil.
Simmer 35 minutes until chestnuts are tender and sauce reduced.
Blanch chicken, cut into pieces.
Combine chicken, papaya, dates, ginger in pot with water.
Bring to boil, simmer 1 hour.
Season with salt. Good for milk production.
Sear chicken thighs in a dry pan until golden.
Add ginger, scallion, soy sauce and sugar.
Pour in rice wine, bring to boil.
Cover and braise 25 minutes, basting occasionally.
Marinate chicken with cornstarch and splash of soy sauce.
Blanch broccoli 2 minutes, drain.
Stir-fry chicken until cooked, set aside.
Sauté garlic, add broccoli, chicken, cashews and oyster sauce. Toss well.
Blanch pig trotter pieces 5 minutes, rinse.
Soak peanuts 1 hour.
Combine all ingredients in pressure cooker or pot.
Pressure cook 45 minutes or simmer 2 hours until trotter is fall-off-bone tender.
Soak mushrooms until soft, halve.
Marinate ribs with soy sauce, oyster sauce, cornstarch, garlic.
Layer mushrooms and ribs in dish.
Steam 25 minutes until ribs are tender.
Soak liver slices in water 10 minutes, drain.
Heat sesame oil, fry ginger until golden.
Add liver, quickly stir-fry on high heat 2 minutes.
Deglaze with rice wine, cook 1 minute more. Serve immediately.
Blanch ribs, rinse.
Combine ribs, lotus root, corn, dates, ginger in pot.
Bring to boil, simmer 1.5 hours.
Season with salt.

recipes.name_en: Steamed Pork Patty with Salted Egg
instructions: Mix pork with soy sauce, cornstarch and water.
Press into a flat patty on plate.
Place salted egg yolk on top (chop the white around patty).
Steam 15 minutes. Garnish with scallion.
Remove white membrane from kidney, slice thin, soak in water with rice wine.
Heat sesame oil, fry ginger until fragrant.
Add kidney slices, stir-fry quickly on high heat.
Add water, dates, bring to boil. Simmer 20 minutes. Add goji last 5 minutes.
Rinse rice, combine with water and ginger in pot.
Bring to boil, simmer 35 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Season pork with salt and white pepper, add to congee with mushrooms.
Cook 10 minutes more. Garnish with scallion.
Blanch pork bones, rinse.
Combine all ingredients in pot.
Bring to boil, simmer 1 hour.
Season with salt.
Mix pork, water chestnut, egg, 1 tbsp soy sauce, cornstarch. Form 4 large balls.
Pan-fry meatballs until golden.
Line pot with cabbage, place meatballs on top.
Add broth, remaining soy sauce, ginger. Simmer covered 30 minutes.
Marinate ribs with garlic, black beans, soy sauce, cornstarch, oil.
Spread pumpkin cubes on plate.
Place marinated ribs on pumpkin.
Steam 25 minutes until ribs are tender.
Pan-fry fish with ginger until both sides golden.
Add boiling water (must be hot for milky soup).
Add papaya and dates, bring to boil.
Simmer 30 minutes until soup is milky white. Season with salt.
Place fish on plate with ginger underneath and on top.
Steam over high heat 10 minutes.
Discard steaming liquid, top with fresh scallion and ginger.
Pour hot oil over, then drizzle soy sauce and sesame oil.
Score fish skin, pan-fry skin-side down until crispy.
Flip and cook 2 minutes.
Mix soy sauce, mirin, sugar. Pour into pan with ginger.
Simmer until sauce glazes the fish.
Cook rice congee base: rice + water, boil then simmer 30 minutes.
Season fish slices with salt and white pepper.
When congee is thick, add fish and ginger. Cook 3 minutes.
Garnish with scallion and cilantro.
Pan-fry fish head with ginger until golden both sides.
Add boiling water immediately for milky effect.
Bring to rolling boil, then add tofu.
Simmer 20 minutes. Season with salt and white pepper.
Pan-fry fish briefly with ginger.
Add water and red dates, bring to boil.
Simmer 20 minutes.
Add goji and rice wine in last 5 minutes.
Place salmon on plate with ginger.
Top with black beans and garlic.
Steam 12 minutes.
Garnish with scallion and drizzle soy sauce.
Sauté ginger and tomatoes until soft.
Add water, bring to boil.
Add tofu, simmer 10 minutes.
Add fish slices, cook gently 5 minutes. Season.
Pan-fry fish until golden both sides.
Add ginger, scallion, soy sauce, sugar, wine and water.
Add tofu slices around fish.
Braise covered 15 minutes, basting occasionally.
Place fish on plate, drizzle with rice wine, top with ginger.
Steam 8-10 minutes until just cooked.
Discard liquid, top with scallion.
Drizzle with sesame oil.
Soak clams in salted water 30 minutes to purge sand.
Bring water and ginger to boil.
Add clams and rice wine, cover.
Cook until all clams open, about 5 minutes. Garnish with scallion.

recipes.name_en: Sweet Vinegar Pig Trotter with Ginger
instructions: Cook ginger in dry wok until dried out.
Blanch pig trotter pieces.
Combine vinegar, sugar, water, ginger in pot. Bring to boil.
Add trotter, simmer 2 hours. Add peeled eggs in last 30 minutes.
Place cold tofu on plate.
Top with diced century egg.
Drizzle with soy sauce and sesame oil.
Garnish with scallion. Serve cold.
Blanch tofu cubes 2 minutes, drain.
Stir-fry pork with garlic and ginger.
Add doubanjiang, stir until oil turns red.
Add tofu, soy sauce, small amount of water. Simmer 5 minutes. Thicken with cornstarch.
Bring water to boil, add tomato and cook 5 minutes.
Add tofu, simmer 3 minutes.
Slowly drizzle in beaten egg while stirring gently.
Season with salt, drizzle sesame oil. Garnish with scallion.
Pan-fry tofu slices until golden both sides.
Sauté mushrooms and ginger.
Add soy sauce, oyster sauce and water.
Add tofu, braise 10 minutes. Thicken sauce with cornstarch.
Bring dashi to gentle simmer.
Add wakame and tofu.
Remove from heat, dissolve miso paste into soup.
Garnish with scallion. Do not boil after adding miso.
Cut tofu into triangles, scoop out center.
Mix shrimp with ginger, egg white, cornstarch. Stuff into tofu.
Pan-fry stuffed tofu shrimp-side down until golden.
Add oyster sauce and water, braise 8 minutes.
Pan-fry tofu until golden on all sides, set aside.
Sauté garlic and black beans until fragrant.
Add red pepper, stir-fry 1 minute.
Return tofu, add soy sauce, toss well.
Arrange egg tofu slices on plate.
Steam 8 minutes.
Meanwhile, stir-fry pork with garlic, soy sauce, oyster sauce.
Thicken with cornstarch, pour over steamed tofu.
Blanch beef bones, rinse well.
Combine bones, ginger and water. Bring to boil, skim foam.
Add vegetables, simmer 2 hours on low.
Season with salt. Rich and nourishing.
Brown beef in oil, set aside.
Sauté onion, add tomato paste and tomatoes.
Return beef, add potato, bay leaf and water.
Simmer 1.5 hours until beef is fork-tender.
Marinate beef with soy sauce, cornstarch, rice wine.
Heat oil, stir-fry ginger until fragrant.
Add beef, sear on high heat.
Add scallion and oyster sauce, toss 30 seconds. Serve immediately.
Cook rice congee with ginger 35 minutes.
Season beef with salt and pepper.
Add beef to congee, stir to separate.
Cook 10 minutes. Add goji last 5 minutes. Garnish.
Blanch beef shank, rinse.
Combine all braising ingredients in pot.
Bring to boil, add beef shank.
Simmer 2 hours until tender. Slice to serve.
Beat eggs gently, mix with warm water and salt.
Strain through sieve into heatproof bowl.
Cover with cling wrap, steam on medium 12-15 minutes.
Drizzle soy sauce and sesame oil. Garnish with scallion.
Beat eggs with pinch of salt.
Scramble eggs in hot oil, set aside when just set.
Sauté tomatoes with sugar until soft.
Return eggs, toss together. Garnish with scallion.
Bring water to boil, add sweet rice wine.
Add brown sugar, stir to dissolve.
Crack eggs in, poach until whites set.
Add goji berries. Serve warm.
Bring broth and ginger to boil.
Add spinach, cook 1 minute.
Slowly drizzle in beaten egg while stirring.
Season with salt and sesame oil.
Boil eggs, peel.
Bring water, dates, longan, ginger to boil.
Simmer 15 minutes until dates are plump.
Add peeled eggs and brown sugar. Simmer 5 more minutes.
Slice red dates, combine with goji in pot.
Add water, bring to boil.
Simmer 10 minutes.
Add brown sugar, stir. Drink warm.
Cook vermicelli until just done, drain.
Heat sesame oil, fry ginger until curled and fragrant.
Add water and rice wine, bring to boil.
Add vermicelli, toss well. Serve hot.

recipes.name_en: Red Bean Soup with Tangerine Peel
instructions: Soak red beans overnight or 4 hours.
Soak tangerine peel until soft, scrape off white pith.
Combine beans, peel and water. Bring to boil.
Simmer 1.5 hours until beans are soft. Add sugar.

ingredients: honey or brown sugar to taste
instructions: Rinse rice, combine with water and dates.
Bring to boil, simmer 35 minutes until thick.
Stir in black sesame powder.
Sweeten to taste.
Soak snow fungus 30 minutes, tear into pieces.
Combine fungus, dates and water. Boil then simmer 40 minutes.
Add papaya and sugar, cook 10 minutes.
Add goji last 3 minutes.
Mix miso, mirin, sake and sugar into paste.
Coat salmon fillets, marinate 30 minutes (or overnight).
Wipe off excess marinade.
Grill or broil 8-10 minutes until caramelized.
Blanch fish briefly, rinse.
Pre-cook daikon in water 10 minutes.
Combine dashi, sake, mirin, sugar and soy sauce in pot.
Add daikon and fish, simmer 25 minutes until daikon is translucent.
Sprinkle mackerel with salt, rest 10 minutes.
Pat dry with paper towel.
Grill skin-side up under broiler 8-10 minutes.
Serve with grated daikon and lemon.
Bring dashi to simmer, add daikon and carrot.
Cook 10 minutes until vegetables tender.
Add salmon and tofu, cook 5 minutes.
Remove from heat, dissolve miso. Garnish with scallion.
Score fish skin with shallow cuts.
Combine sauce ingredients and ginger in shallow pan, bring to boil.
Place fish in simmering liquid.
Cover with drop lid (otoshibuta), simmer 12 minutes. Baste occasionally.
Purge clams in salted water 30 minutes.
Bring dashi and sake to simmer, add clams.
Cook until clams open.
Remove from heat, stir in miso. Garnish with scallion.
Mince sardine fillets, mix with ginger, miso, egg white, cornstarch.
Bring dashi and soy sauce to simmer.
Form fish balls with two spoons, drop into broth.
Add tofu, cook 5 minutes. Garnish with scallion.
Place kombu on plate, set cod on top.
Sprinkle with sake.
Steam 10 minutes until fish flakes.
Serve with ponzu, grated daikon and scallion.
Glaze salmon with soy sauce, sake, mirin mixture.
Pan-fry or grill until cooked, flake.
Place over hot rice.
Top with nori, sesame seeds and pickled ginger.

recipes.name_ja: 海老と野菜のかき揚げ
instructions: Mix flour, egg and ice water loosely (lumpy is fine).
Toss shrimp and vegetables in batter.
Drop spoonfuls into 170°C oil.
Fry until golden, about 3 minutes. Serve with tentsuyu.
Simmer onion in dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar.
Add chicken, cook 5 minutes.
Pour beaten eggs over, cover.
Cook until eggs are just set. Slide over rice.
Mix chicken, ginger, scallion, egg, cornstarch.
Bring dashi, soy sauce, mirin to simmer.
Form small meatballs, drop into broth.
Add greens, cook 5 minutes until meatballs float.
Cut all ingredients into bite-sized pieces.
Sauté chicken in oil, add vegetables.
Add dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar.
Simmer with drop lid 25 minutes until vegetables are tender and liquid reduced.
Bring dashi to boil, add chicken.
Cook 5 minutes, add rice.
Simmer 5 minutes until slightly thick.
Drizzle in egg, add ginger. Garnish with scallion and nori.
Score chicken skin. Pan-fry skin-side down until crispy.
Flip, cook 5 minutes more.
Mix sauce ingredients, pour into pan.
Simmer until sauce thickens and glazes chicken. Slice to serve.
Rinse rice, soak 30 minutes.
Combine dashi, soy sauce, sake, mirin.
Layer chicken, burdock, carrot on rice in rice cooker.
Pour seasoned dashi over, cook normally.
Press tofu, cut into 6 pieces, coat in cornstarch.
Deep-fry at 180°C until golden and crispy.
Heat dashi, soy sauce, mirin for sauce.
Serve tofu in sauce, top with daikon, ginger, scallion.
Place cold tofu on serving dish.
Top with ginger, scallion and bonito flakes.
Drizzle with soy sauce.
Serve immediately.
Press tofu, cut into thick steaks. Dust with flour.
Pan-fry in butter until golden both sides.
Sauté mushrooms in same pan.
Add soy sauce, mirin, sake. Simmer until sauce thickens. Pour over tofu.
Combine dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar in pot.
Add onion, simmer 5 minutes.
Add tofu and beef slices.
Simmer 10 minutes. Garnish with scallion.
Stir-fry pork with garlic, ginger, tobanjan.
Add miso, soy sauce, dashi.
Add tofu, simmer 5 minutes.
Thicken with cornstarch. Garnish with scallion.

recipes.name_ja: 豆腐とわかめの味噌汁
instructions: Bring dashi to gentle simmer.
Add tofu and wakame.
Remove from heat, dissolve miso paste.
Garnish with scallion.
Mix ginger, soy sauce, mirin, sake for marinade.
Marinate pork 10 minutes.
Pan-fry onion, then pork on high heat.
Pour remaining marinade over, cook until glazed. Serve on cabbage.
Cut pork into large cubes, boil 30 minutes with ginger. Drain.
Combine fresh dashi, sake, soy sauce, mirin, sugar in pot.
Add pork, simmer on low 1.5 hours.
Add eggs in last 30 minutes. Pork should be melt-in-mouth tender.
Sauté pork in sesame oil.
Add diced vegetables, stir-fry 2 minutes.
Add dashi, bring to boil. Simmer 20 minutes.
Remove from heat, stir in miso. Garnish with scallion.
Bring pot of water to gentle simmer.
Swish pork slices in hot water until just pink.
Drain and arrange on plate with lettuce.
Serve with ponzu, daikon and sesame.
Stir-fry pork in sesame oil until browned.
Add kimchi, stir-fry 2 minutes.
Add tofu, soy sauce, cook 3 minutes.
Garnish with scallion and sesame seeds.
Beat eggs with dashi, sugar, soy sauce, mirin.
Heat tamagoyaki pan with thin oil layer.
Pour thin layer of egg, roll up when half-set.
Repeat 3-4 times, rolling each layer. Slice to serve.
Beat eggs gently, mix with cooled dashi, soy sauce, mirin.
Strain into cups. Place chicken, shrimp, mushroom in cups.
Cover with foil, steam on low 15 minutes.
Garnish with mitsuba. Custard should be silky.
Bring dashi, soy sauce, mirin to boil.
Add cornstarch slurry to thicken slightly.
Cook udon, place in bowl.
Pour broth over, drizzle egg into hot broth. Top with scallion and ginger.

recipes.name_en: Soft-Boiled Egg on Rice (Tamago Kake Gohan)
instructions: Place hot rice in bowl.
Crack egg on top.
Drizzle soy sauce.
Mix vigorously. Add toppings as desired.
Sauté beef and onion in oil.
Add potatoes, carrot, shirataki.
Pour in dashi, sake, sugar, soy sauce, mirin.
Cover with drop lid, simmer 25 minutes until potatoes are tender.
Combine dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar, sake in pan.
Add onion, simmer 5 minutes.
Add beef, cook until just done.
Serve over rice with pickled ginger.
Heat pan, sear a few beef slices with sugar.
Add soy sauce, sake, mirin mixture.
Add vegetables, tofu, noodles.
Simmer together. Dip in beaten raw egg to eat.

recipes.name_ja: 牛肉とごぼうのきんぴら
instructions: Sauté burdock and carrot in sesame oil 3 minutes.
Add beef, stir-fry until browned.
Add soy sauce, mirin, sugar.
Cook until liquid evaporates. Sprinkle sesame seeds.
Soak hijiki 20 minutes, drain.
Sauté hijiki, carrot and sliced aburaage in sesame oil.
Add dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar.
Simmer 15 minutes until liquid absorbed. Add edamame.
Soak burdock in water 5 minutes to prevent browning.
Sauté burdock and carrot in sesame oil 3 minutes.
Add soy sauce, mirin, sugar, chili.
Cook until liquid evaporates. Top with sesame seeds.

recipes.name_ja: ほうれん草のおひたし
instructions: Blanch spinach in boiling water 30 seconds, plunge into ice water.
Squeeze dry, cut into 3cm lengths.
Mix dashi, soy sauce, mirin. Pour over spinach.
Top with bonito flakes and sesame seeds.
Bring dashi to boil, add sweet potato.
Simmer 12 minutes until soft.
Remove from heat, dissolve miso.
Add wakame and garnish with scallion.
Stir natto vigorously with included sauce until stringy.
Place over hot rice.
Add soy sauce, scallion, mustard.
Top with egg yolk if desired.
Cut kabocha with skin on into bite-sized pieces.
Place skin-side down in pot.
Add dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar, sake.
Cover with drop lid, simmer 15 minutes until tender.
Wet hands with salted water.
Place rice in palm, add salmon filling.
Shape into triangle or ball.
Wrap with nori strip. Great for snacking while nursing.
Mix ground pork with soy sauce, sesame oil, cornstarch, and water until sticky.
Flatten into a disc on a heatproof plate, top with soaked cordyceps flowers and ginger.
Steam over high heat for 15 minutes until pork is cooked through.
Drizzle with hot oil and serve.

recipes.name_en: Hairy Gourd with Dried Scallop Stir-Fry
instructions: Marinate pork slices with soy sauce for 10 minutes.
Heat oil, stir-fry garlic and dried scallops until fragrant.
Add pork slices, cook until colour changes.
Add hairy gourd, stir-fry 3–4 minutes until tender. Season and serve.

recipes.name_en: Tea Tree Mushroom Steamed Spare Ribs
instructions: Marinate ribs with soy sauce, oyster sauce, cornstarch, and sesame oil for 20 minutes.
Arrange soaked tea tree mushrooms on plate, place ribs on top with ginger.
Steam over high heat for 20 minutes.
Serve directly in the steaming plate.
Beat eggs with a pinch of salt.
Heat oil, scramble eggs until just set, remove and set aside.
In the same pan, cook tomato until softened, add corn kernels.
Return eggs, toss together with sugar and spring onion. Serve.
Blanch soaked fish maw in boiling water with ginger for 5 minutes, drain.
Cut fish maw into pieces.
Bring chicken broth to boil, add cabbage, ginger, and fish maw.
Simmer 30 minutes until fish maw is soft. Add goji berries, season and serve.
Marinate chicken with soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, and cornstarch for 15 minutes.
Arrange chestnuts on heatproof plate, place chicken and ginger on top.
Steam over high heat for 20 minutes until chicken is cooked.
Garnish with spring onion and serve.

recipes.name_en: Red Date Goji Steamed Pork Patty
instructions: Mix ground pork with soy sauce, sesame oil, and cornstarch.
Flatten into a disc on a plate, scatter red dates and goji berries on top.
Steam over high heat for 15 minutes.
Drizzle with a little soy sauce and serve.
Parboil potato cubes for 3 minutes, drain.
Heat oil, sear pork until golden on all sides.
Add garlic, soy sauce, sugar, and rose wine, stir-fry briefly.
Add potato, toss together and cook 5 more minutes until tender.
Heat sesame oil, fry ginger until fragrant and golden.
Add chicken, stir-fry until sealed on all sides.
Pour in yellow wine and water, add brown sugar.
Bring to boil, then simmer 25 minutes until chicken is tender and sauce reduced.
Blanch ribs, drain and set aside.
Sauté ginger, add fresh tomato and cook until soft.
Add tomato paste, sugar, soy sauce, and water. Bring to boil.
Add ribs, simmer 25 minutes until tender and sauce thickened.

recipes.name_en: Lotus Root Peanut Braised Chicken Thigh
instructions: Brown chicken thighs in oil with ginger.
Add lotus root, peanuts, soy sauce, and oyster sauce.
Pour in water, bring to boil.
Cover and simmer 35 minutes until lotus root is tender and chicken falls off bone.

recipes.name_en: Double Mushroom Snow Fungus Steamed Chicken
ingredients: snow fungus 1 piece, soaked and torn
instructions: Marinate chicken with soy sauce and sesame oil for 15 minutes.
Layer mushrooms and snow fungus on plate, place chicken on top with ginger.
Steam over high heat for 18 minutes.
Drizzle with spring onion oil before serving.

ingredients: dried tangerine peel 1 small piece, soaked and minced
instructions: Mix pork and dace fish paste with soy sauce, sesame oil, cornstarch, tangerine peel, and water.
Flatten mixture into a disc on a heatproof plate.
Steam over high heat for 15 minutes.
Pour off excess liquid, drizzle with heated soy sauce and oil.
Marinate chicken with soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, and cornstarch for 15 minutes.
Arrange soaked porcini on plate, place chicken on top with ginger.
Steam over high heat for 20 minutes.
Serve with porcini soaking liquid drizzled over.
Mix pork with soy sauce, sesame oil, ginger, and cornstarch until sticky.
Flatten into a disc, press lotus seeds into the surface.
Steam over high heat for 15 minutes.
Garnish with chopped spring onion.
Marinate pork with soy sauce for 10 minutes.
Heat oil, stir-fry ginger and pork until colour changes.
Add yam slices and wood ear, stir-fry 3–4 minutes.
Season with a pinch of salt and serve. Yam should be just tender.

recipes.name_en: Ginger Carrot Stir-Fried Pork Belly Strips
instructions: Heat oil, stir-fry ginger until fragrant.
Add pork belly slices, cook until edges crisp slightly.
Add carrot, rice wine, and soy sauce.
Stir-fry 3 minutes until carrot is tender-crisp. Serve hot.

ingredients: dried shiitake mushrooms 6, soaked and halved
instructions: Marinate chicken with soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, and cornstarch for 15 minutes.
Place mushrooms on plate, arrange chicken and ginger on top.
Steam over high heat for 18 minutes.
Drizzle with hot oil and serve.

ingredients: dried wood ear fungus 15g, soaked and chopped
instructions: Mix pork with chopped wood ear, soy sauce, sesame oil, cornstarch, and water.
Flatten into a disc on heatproof plate.
Steam over high heat for 15 minutes.
Pour off excess liquid, drizzle with soy sauce.

ingredients: dried shiitake mushrooms 4, soaked and diced
instructions: Blanch broccoli until bright green, arrange on plate.
Heat oil, stir-fry garlic, mushrooms, and pork until cooked.
Add oyster sauce and cornstarch slurry, stir until sauce thickens.
Pour mushroom pork sauce over broccoli and serve.

recipes.name_en: Red Date Goji Steamed Spare Ribs
instructions: Marinate ribs with soy sauce, cornstarch, and sesame oil for 20 minutes.
Place ribs on plate, top with red dates, goji berries, and ginger.
Steam over high heat for 20 minutes.
Serve directly.

recipes.name_en: Bitter Melon with Chicken Stir-Fried Ribs
instructions: Marinate ribs with soy sauce, sugar, and cornstarch for 15 minutes.
Deep-fry or pan-fry ribs until golden, set aside.
Stir-fry garlic, black beans, and bitter melon 2 minutes.
Return ribs, toss together until bitter melon is tender-crisp.
Heat oil, sauté garlic until fragrant.
Add hairy gourd, stir-fry 3 minutes.
Add chicken broth and oyster sauce, simmer 5 minutes until gourd is tender.
Add diced abalone, thicken with cornstarch slurry. Serve.

recipes.name_en: Snow Lotus Red Date Goji Sweet Soup
instructions: Rinse soaked snow lotus seeds, drain.
Bring water to boil, add snow lotus seeds and red dates.
Simmer 30 minutes until snow lotus seeds are translucent.
Add goji berries and rock sugar, cook 5 more minutes. Serve warm.
